$comment: DRAFT — NOT ACTIVE. For future activation only. See docs/agent-runtime/inactive-frame-registry.md for activation triggers.
title: BoundaryEnvelope
description: Every cross-project data flow MUST be wrapped in this envelope. Separates format compatibility from authority compatibility. The payload is the actual contract (TaskSpec, EvidenceIndex, etc.); the envelope declares who produced it, under what authority, and with what freshness.

envelope_version.description: Version of the envelope schema itself

decision_authority.description: Can this producer decide pass/fail? External frames: always false.

gate_result_allowed.description: Can produce GateResult? External frames: always false.

value.description: Is this evidence current or historical?

approved_run_id.description: If currency_basis=approved_run, the RunSpec ID that produced this evidence

frame_manifest_digest.description: SHA256 of the frame manifest at time of production

path_key.description: Manifest path_key for this artifact's source

payload.description: The actual contract data. Schema validated against contract_type + contract_version.
